## Recap:

We’re eating pancakes in a restaurant

## Agenda:

## Log:

WE go find the worshippers of Mystra.

Head toward the Temple of Wonder, named by Mystra herself as a symbol for wizards to seek out their questions in the field of arcane. (ie wondering lmao)

![](data:image/png;base64,)

^ blue glowing strand of arcane energy flowing from the top down to the statue in the mid of the temple

Bunch of people wearing blue robes with this symbol

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Helping and guiding those who are lost and don’t know what they’re looking for. Talking about the faith, religion, and what Mystra does for wizards

Avery is talking to one of the priests and I go put the letter on the altar

I put Rhychard’s letter onto the altar and take a few steps back. One of the priests taps us on the shoulder → can’t tell who it is, gestures for us to follow him

I call the rest of the party over

We are escorted to another room that look like a chapel (benches and altars and etc). Escorted to sit down on the benches. Five other priests walk in, close the doors, pull the curtains (a bit dim-ish)

They stand in front of us. The person escorting us takes out the letter.

Tldr tell the priests about our deal with Rhychard.

LONG STORY told the priests about the blood body ritual and meeting Mystra. Has been a long time since someone has reached out to someone outside of the faith → last recorded happened during the fall of rath. (many hundreds of years ago, esragrun???)

^ might be a sign of mystra herself

What the priests found:

* Perpetrator mentioned in the letter is of someone within the upper ministry of the cabinet
* One of those closer toward the High Wizard
* What seems to be happening:
* Cases of ingredients being bought out by both the military and the city guards
* Have been transporting them toward the prison
* Investigation has led them to believe they’re being transported elsewhere as the ingredients were not there
* Ingredients such as yeast and bread making supplies

They swear on Mystra that they won’t send us to jail for revealing that we broke Inlahala out of prison

Inlahala reveals the bread thing

* They can’t recreate life right now because they don’t have the soul/core thing
* Last living one is living inside Variel and getting it would mean killing her (they’re hiding Vaery)

The priests asks if they can recreate the experiment (Variel)

[INSIGHT 19] There’s a slight change in expression in Inlahala’s face as if she were thinking/considering something else

* She says that it would not be possible unless they complete a trek to another realm (v dangerous journey)

Priests will be back with us in half an hour

Inlahala worries that they found someone/someway to recreate the ingredient that they are missing through some other means

* The ingredient required to make the experiment work is hidden in the Feywild
* Very rare and only had six in total.
* Only one was able to be used
* The other two was left in incubation (one was destroyed and one is Vaery)
* There probs won’t be any left
* Only created 3 bodies, 4th was incomplete (missing circulatory systems along the chest to head)

Priests come back

If what Inlahala says it to be believed, the last point of concern is the person in charge of the whole project.

Suspects:

* general of the naz’jan army
* Secretary to the high wizard
* All inspiring counsel to the cabinet (third highest ranking member of the cabinet, deals with laws and policies)
* Visions show that rhychard was fighting AGAINST the beings
* The beings were created to overthrow the government from within

Compiled timeline of her routine for the week

Monday:

Goes to work, get a breakfast from a café along the way, ride her broom to the office and stays there for 12-14 hours.

Returns home at night without any stops

Tuesday:

Skips breakfast, goes straight to office. Lunch around noon. Office. Visits another home (a friend/relative??) → two house: is near the Gate or a couple sectors to the right (near the Institute. Home

Wednesday:

Goes to work, get a breakfast from a café along the way, ride her broom to the office and stays there for 12-14 hours.

Returns home at night without any stops

Thursday:

Home the whole day. Just doesn’t leave her house

Friday:

Goes straight to office. Dinner (sometimes with friend). Home.

Sat - Sun: stays home the whole day

^ Always seem to come home about the same time 10-11pm

Today would be Wednesday.

Seems to hang out with a couple of friends for lunch. (colleagues from the cabinet

![](data:image/png;base64,)
^ Maebael Saevine, Secretary to the High Wizard

Knows she can cast up to the 5th level → has some form of defence

* Be careful entering her home, most likely laced with some form of security

Entrances to her house:

* Main stairwell
* Broom window

We’re dismissed

We go look for Mystra’s amulet in the main room

* They put it at the back, in a glass case
* ![](data:image/png;base64,)
* [DETECT MAGIC] there’s some sort of arcana flowing around the glass itself (maybe the glass has some sort of strength)

Head Priest: a slightly older gentleman, half elf, 120th birthday last week, is almost entirely gray, not bald but very short receeding hairline (imagine Pope Francis)

Blue and white robes

Uses the amulet only when the temple is under attack or when Rhychard needs the combat mages

History:

* Atrana ruled the western continent
* Rath ruled the eastern continent
* When Esragrun was around, they were still two kingdoms
* Esragrun took over most of everything
* When Esragrun was defeated, both empired had to rebuild
* Atrana was disbanded, other kingdoms evolved from the ashes of the war
* We would know the majority races in every empire
* Major war is between Lurian and Rath, past few years (8-9 years)
* [HIST 10] the leaders are butting heads about something

Esragrun’s Plans:

* Two fronts of attack (one in Birdinia and Keolon)
* Our only request was don’t touch Emaba

[PERCEPT 18] There are more guards roaming the city than normal (could be looking for Inlahala)

WE ARE BREAKING INTO MAEBEL’S HOSUE

Looks like a condo with a doorman

It on the 14th floor, Room 2 → take the elevator

From underneath the door, a single flame flickering. Door is closed. Twig unlocks the door. Cracks the door open. There’s a meow.

![](data:image/png;base64,)

Hall:

Not much décor or furniture

No detect magic

Lower Room:

Maebel is sleeping on the table

Twig casts Entangle on the two of them

This thing Entangled is not a person (something dressed up as Maebel)

Detect Magic on the doors, doors start closing (Main door, window and everything door to the other room all closed)

Poke the fake Maebel, feels like poking Variel

Inlahala inspects the fake Maebel, it’s a bad imitated version of what Inlahala was making

All the doors have some sort of magic, and the Left Room has magic.

Cat is at the door, pushing the very corner. A plank holding the right side of the door bends slightly and the cat slips through

We brute force the door open

Left Room:

A bunch of other cats in the other room, running around. They run to the spiral staircase. There’s an actual Maebel sitting there with a cat in her arms, stroking it very gingerly.
